subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-15 in Liverpool
subcodes.first_line: From the day I left Haifa to the present time, the confirmations of the Kingdom have encompassed me more and more with every passing day
subcodes.first_line_orig: از روز حرکت از حیفا تا حال هر روزی تأییدات ملکوت بیشتر احاطه نمود
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @critique of Western values; culture, @service to others; to the Cause of God
